query_basis: Reviewed live official KanCare Home, Eligibility, and Appeals/Fair Hearings leaves now preserve Kansas Medicaid coverage, eligibility rules, and appeal routing on the current first-party stack.

samples.evidence_snippet: Welcome to KanCare. KanCare delivers health care to eligible Kansans. The live official page links to Eligibility, Appeals & Fair Hearings, Medicaid State Plan, CHIP State Plan, and 1115 Waiver Reports.

The Kansas Department of Health and Environment (KDHE) Division of Health Care Finance offers medical assistance. KanCare under the Medicaid plan is the largest program and the page preserves covered groups, general rules, and income/resource guidance.
The live official KanCare Appeals & Fair Hearings lane preserves grievance, appeal, and state fair-hearing routing on the same first-party Medicaid stack.

query_basis: Reviewed browser-rendered official KanCare evidence now preserves Kansas HCBS waiver entry even though sibling raw lightweight fetches to KDADS still hit access-denied shells.

samples.evidence_snippet: The live official KanCare home page says Kansas is developing a new waiver called the Community Support Waiver (CSW) and that the waiver will help shorten the waiting list for services provided through the home and community based services (HCBS).

samples.sample_name: FS-7 Medicaid Home and Community Based Services (HCBS)
samples.evidence_snippet: The official KanCare FS-7 fact sheet says Kansas has a variety of Home and Community Based Services programs, that there are seven HCBS waivers, and that one waiver serves people who meet the definition of intellectual or developmental disability, with application routing through the KanCare Clearinghouse at 1-800-792-4884.

query_basis: Reviewed browser-readable official KDADS leaves on 2026-06-23 after the prior raw-fetch transport blocker proved too pessimistic. The official KDADS root, Intellectual / Developmentally Disabled Information page, Community Support Waiver page, HCBS Waiver Programs page, and HCBS Leadership & Staff page all rendered with role-bearing content and current statewide routing signals.

samples.evidence_snippet: The live official KDADS home page renders public HCBS and disability program navigation, including Home and Community Based Services, Intellectual / Developmentally Disabled Information, and Community Support Waiver links.
The official KDADS page is a public first-party I/DD information leaf under Home and Community Based Services Information.

The Community Support Waiver page says the waiver will assist Kansans with intellectual and developmental disabilities (I/DD) who do not need continuous, 24-hour support and preserves a public questions/comments contact.

The official HCBS Leadership & Staff page names I/DD-specific statewide roles including I/DD Waiver Program Manager, Assistant I/DD Director, and PD/IDD Waitlist and TCM Study Coordinator, plus the KDADS main office phone.

query_basis: Reviewed live KSDE Early Childhood Special Education leaf now again provides Kansas birth-to-three, Part C, KDHE administration, and local ITS referral context.

samples.evidence_snippet: All Kansas infants and toddlers (birth to age 3) are entitled to a free developmental evaluation to determine if they are eligible for early intervention services. Kansas Early Childhood Developmental Services (KECDS) within the Kansas Department of Health and Environment (KDHE) administers early intervention services under Part C of the Individuals with Disabilities Education Act (IDEA). Visit www.itsofks.org to find your local Infant Toddler Services of Kansas program.

query_basis: Reviewed live KSDE Special Education leaf now again preserves a role-pure IDEA Part B root with direct dispute-resolution and parent-rights leaves on the same official path.

samples.evidence_snippet: The Individuals with Disabilities Education Act (IDEA) ensures a free appropriate public education (FAPE) to children with disabilities and the official KSDE Special Education page links to Dispute Resolution, Procedural Safeguards (Parent Rights), Special Education Due Process Hearing Decisions, and Special Education Formal Complaint Decisions.

query_basis: Reviewed the current official KSDE state roots plus one exact district-scoped submit attempt in the bounded raw lane, then preserved the district-grade blocker against the existing reviewed district-leaf inventory.
blocker_evidence: The current KSDE Directory Reports root, Directories root, and educational-directory PDF URL all return the same `Request Rejected` shell in the bounded raw lane, and the Directory Reports shell exposes no `__VIEWSTATE`, `__VIEWSTATEGENERATOR`, or `__EVENTVALIDATION` fields.

samples.evidence_snippet: Special Education Services | Atchison Public Schools preserves a district-owned special-education services leaf on the official usd409.net host.
The official usd385.org district-owned Special Education leaf preserves role-exact special-education content on the live Andover Public Schools host.
The official Arkansas City USD 470 host preserves a role-exact Special Education leaf on the district-owned usd470.com domain.
The official Lawrence Public Schools host preserves a district-owned Special Education Services leaf under Student Support Services on usd497.org.

The live Garden City Public Schools sitemap exposes an exact district-owned Special Education leaf, and the fetched gckschools.com page preserves role-exact special-education content on the district host.

samples.sample_name: Kansas Educational Directory Reports home page
samples.evidence_snippet: The public KSDE Directory Reports app still preserves the exact district-scoped export contract that feeds Kansas district-owned leaf repair.

The KSDE export-backed Abilene USD 435 district root and sitemap are live, but bounded role-exact special-education path checks all returned Page Not Found and the sitemap preserved no special-education leaf.

query_basis: Reviewed live Kansas DCF Rehabilitation Services Program Overview page now provides a role-pure statewide VR root instead of the old KDADS misclassification.
Reviewed first-party DRC Kansas evidence on disk plus live About/Get Help pages prove the statewide protection-and-advocacy role and help path.
Reviewed first-party Families Together evidence on disk explicitly states that it is Kansas’ federally designated Parent Training & Information Center.
Reviewed live Kansas Legal Services root explicitly identifies itself as a non-profit law firm serving Kansans.
Reviewed ABLE federal-crossover source remains intact in the program spine.
Reviewed SSA crossover source remains intact in the program spine.
Reviewed live official KanCare Ombudsman Counties in Alphabetical Order directory now exposes county-specific Community Resources guide links across all 105 Kansas counties on the first-party stack.

samples.evidence_snippet: The official KanCare Ombudsman Counties in Alphabetical Order page lists county-specific Community Resources guides and shows 1 - 25 of 105 items, beginning with Allen County Community Resources through Edwards County Community Resources.
The same official directory continues county-specific Community Resources guides on page 2 and shows 26 - 50 of 105 items, including Ellis, Finney, Franklin, Geary, Harvey, and Johnson counties.
The official directory ends with county-specific Community Resources guides for Washington, Wichita, Wilson, Woodson, and Wyandotte counties and shows 101 - 105 of 105 items.
